subject: Re: Fabio Buzzi-1st pic
body:
price?


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 5, 2006 1:52:54 PM
Subject: Fabio Buzzi-1st pic


Dear Mr. Epstein,
 
 
thank for your interest on our boats. 
We are delighted to have one of our boats in Caribean waters.
After our conversation we think that the right boat for you is our RIB42 Hardtop.
We enclose some pictures with a sliding rear door even if we don't reccomend it for your area. We propose the same configuration completely open on the beck in order to provide a good ventilation as a similar small boat has serious problems with air conditioning. 
The boat can be powered by 2 CAT C12 or Cummins QSM11 both of 720hp each with a top speed  around 60 knots, incredible rough water handling and security.
We remain at your full disposal for further questions or different models that you can see in our webpage www.fbdesign.it eventaully for the password full fill again the access page.
best regards
 
 
Fabio Buzzi
